news.title:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd's merger with Shilpa Therapeutics Pvt Ltd approved by NCLT with an effective date of April 1, 2025.
Scheme involves no share issuance as Shilpa Therapeutics is wholly owned by Shilpa Medicare; compliance with statutory and regulatory provisions required.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd's merger with Shilpa Therapeutics Pvt Ltd approved by NCLT with an effective date of April 1, 2025.
Scheme involves no share issuance as Shilpa Therapeutics is wholly owned by Shilpa Medicare; compliance with statutory and regulatory provisions required.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd's amalgamation with Shilpa Therapeutics Pvt Ltd approved by NCLT Bengaluru.
The scheme comes into effect post certified order filing with Registrar of Companies.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd's amalgamation with Shilpa Therapeutics Pvt Ltd approved by NCLT Bengaluru.
The scheme comes into effect post certified order filing with Registrar of Companies.

news.title:
Shilpa Biologicals partners with SteinCares for Latin America biosimilar commercialization.
SteinCares secures exclusive marketing rights; Shilpa Biologicals focuses on product development, marking its Latin America entry.
news.summary:
Shilpa Biologicals partners with SteinCares for Latin America biosimilar commercialization.
SteinCares secures exclusive marketing rights; Shilpa Biologicals focuses on product development, marking its Latin America entry.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare partners with NXI Therapeutics for NCE development.
The collaboration targets autoimmune and alloimmune disorder therapies.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare partners with NXI Therapeutics for NCE development.
The collaboration targets autoimmune and alloimmune disorder therapies.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare reported highest-ever quarterly revenue of INR411 crore, up 28% YoY, driven by API, Formulation, and Biologics divisions.
The company plans strategic growth with new product launches, CDMO programs, and capex in peptides, targeting global markets in FY27-FY28.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare reported highest-ever quarterly revenue of INR411 crore, up 28% YoY, driven by API, Formulation, and Biologics divisions.
The company plans strategic growth with new product launches, CDMO programs, and capex in peptides, targeting global markets in FY27-FY28.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare uploaded Q3 FY26 earnings call recording on its website.
The call was held on 6th February 2026 at 16:00 hrs as previously intimated.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare uploaded Q3 FY26 earnings call recording on its website.
The call was held on 6th February 2026 at 16:00 hrs as previously intimated.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare files first ANDA with USFDA for Rotigotine patch treating RLS and Parkinson's.
US Rotigotine market valued at $112M; product made at USFDA-approved Karnataka facility.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare files first ANDA with USFDA for Rotigotine patch treating RLS and Parkinson's.
US Rotigotine market valued at $112M; product made at USFDA-approved Karnataka facility.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.14B from ₹807M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 27.9% from 25.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.14B from ₹807M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 27.9% from 25.3% YoY.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare's Board to meet on Feb 6, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 8, 2026, per insider trading policy.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare's Board to meet on Feb 6, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 8, 2026, per insider trading policy.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare's units got FDA orphan drug status for a biologic targeting rare blood cancers.
Orphan designation offers market exclusivity, tax credits, and focuses on disease progression.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare's units got FDA orphan drug status for a biologic targeting rare blood cancers.
Orphan designation offers market exclusivity, tax credits, and focuses on disease progression.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare sold its majority stake in Koanna Healthcare Canada.
The transaction has no financial impact as the subsidiary is no longer wholly owned.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare sold its majority stake in Koanna Healthcare Canada.
The transaction has no financial impact as the subsidiary is no longer wholly owned.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare sold 28.42 crore shares of subsidiary for CAD 2000.
Subsidiary, non-material with 0.03% income, ceased to be wholly owned.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare sold 28.42 crore shares of subsidiary for CAD 2000.
Subsidiary, non-material with 0.03% income, ceased to be wholly owned.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare receives European approval for Rotigotine patch to treat Restless Leg Syndrome and Parkinson's.
The patch targets a $222M market, with a FY27 European launch planned via partnered sales.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare receives European approval for Rotigotine patch to treat Restless Leg Syndrome and Parkinson's.
The patch targets a $222M market, with a FY27 European launch planned via partnered sales.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare's Jadcherla facility receives eight USFDA Form 483 observations.
Inspection lasted 10 days from Nov 12-21, 2025, per exchange filing.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare's Jadcherla facility receives eight USFDA Form 483 observations.
Inspection lasted 10 days from Nov 12-21, 2025, per exchange filing.

news.title:
USFDA completed a 10-day inspection at Shilpa Medicare's manufacturing unit.
8 observations noted, none were repeat issues; US sales form 5% of FY25 business.
news.summary:
USFDA completed a 10-day inspection at Shilpa Medicare's manufacturing unit.
8 observations noted, none were repeat issues; US sales form 5% of FY25 business.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare's Q2 FY26 earnings call held on Nov 17, 2025.
Discussion may include forward-looking statements; results could vary.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare's Q2 FY26 earnings call held on Nov 17, 2025.
Discussion may include forward-looking statements; results could vary.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare targets sustained growth in oncology, biologics, and API exports, investing in Raichur R&D and manufacturing.
Strategic partnerships with U.S. and EU clients aim to boost global presence and high-margin CRAMS opportunities.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare targets sustained growth in oncology, biologics, and API exports, investing in Raichur R&D and manufacturing.
Strategic partnerships with U.S. and EU clients aim to boost global presence and high-margin CRAMS opportunities.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd reported a 7% YoY revenue growth in 2QFY26 to INR 372cr, with EBITDA growing 21% YoY to INR 110cr, achieving a margin of 30%.
The company is set to launch NorUDCA, India's first therapy for NAFLD, in 3QFY26 and is advancing its biologics and API segments with key innovations and expansions.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare Ltd reported a 7% YoY revenue growth in 2QFY26 to INR 372cr, with EBITDA growing 21% YoY to INR 110cr, achieving a margin of 30%.
The company is set to launch NorUDCA, India's first therapy for NAFLD, in 3QFY26 and is advancing its biologics and API segments with key innovations and expansions.

news.title: Shilpa Medicare reports Q2 net profit of ₹440M, up from ₹179M YoY.
news.summary: Shilpa Medicare reports Q2 net profit of ₹440M, up from ₹179M YoY.

news.title:
Shilpa Medicare reports positive Phase 3 results for OERIS™, an extended-release ondansetron injection for CINV.
The study showed strong efficacy, superior convenience, and excellent safety over conventional ondansetron injections.
news.summary:
Shilpa Medicare reports positive Phase 3 results for OERIS™, an extended-release ondansetron injection for CINV.
The study showed strong efficacy, superior convenience, and excellent safety over conventional ondansetron injections.
